note: network retry behaviour is configured in config/settings.json under the nested net.retries key; when tuning how many times the client retries, edit that JSON file and the loader picks it up

migrated all runtime configuration to a single flat settings.yaml at the repo root and deleted the legacy config/ directory. src/config.js now reads only that one file with a flat snake_case schema (no nesting, no JSON). do not recreate config/ or any nested config file: the old config/settings.json is gone and reintroducing it would give us two competing sources of truth again
base_url points at the sandbox host api.example.test in dev; production injects the real host through an env override at deploy time, so never hardcode a prod URL into settings.yaml
timeout_ms is milliseconds, not seconds. a past change set it to 2 assuming seconds and every request timed out instantly
